seo.description: Cadet III Video Input is an input amplifier for video synthesis systems. The Cadet series brings simple, analog DIY video synthesizer building blocks to the Eurorack modular environment.

global:description_tag.value: Cadet III Video Input is an input amplifier for video synthesis systems. The Cadet series brings simple, analog DIY video synthesizer building blocks to the Eurorack modular environment.

seo.description: Cadet IV Dual Ramp Generator is a dual waveform generator which creates 3 different fixed frequency ramp waveforms locked to the horizontal and vertical dimensions of a video display. The Cadet series of DIY Eurorack modules brings simple, analog DIY video synthesizer building blocks to your modular workspace.

global:description_tag.value: Cadet IV Dual Ramp Generator is a dual waveform generator which creates 3 different fixed frequency ramp waveforms locked to the horizontal and vertical dimensions of a video display. seo.description: Cadet V Scaler is a 4-channel wide bandwidth voltage scaler which can be ordered or built as a DIY module for the purposes of several different standards conversions.

global:description_tag.value: Cadet V Scaler is a 4-channel wide bandwidth voltage scaler which can be ordered or built as a DIY module for the purposes of several different standards conversions.

seo.description: Cadet VI Fader is a 2-input, 1-output voltage controlled crossfader module.

global:description_tag.value: Cadet VI Fader is a 2-input, 1-output voltage controlled crossfader module.

seo.description: A new concept in pattern generation for video synthesizers. Diver is a single axis waveform sampler, ramps generator and digital effects buffer which translates audio signals to the 2D space of the analog video frame. Add scrolling motion to your patches and transform any audio source into a powerful shape generator.

Add scrolling motion to your patches and transform any audio source into a powerful shape generator.
